command: Use @skill:chained-vulnerability-static-audit to perform a static-only chained vulnerability review of this codebase. Inspect only the current working directory. Do not use live probes, dynamic scanners, shell commands, or files outside this workspace. Write the final report with write_chained_vulnerability_report to docs/security/CHAINED_VULNERABILITIES_REVIEW.md.

FROM python:3.10-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
RUN python manage.py migrate
EXPOSE 8082
CMD ["python", "manage.py", "runserver", "0.0.0.0:8082"]

chains.chain_name: User Enumeration → Offline MD5 Crack → Medical Records Exfiltration

unmatched_candidate_chain_titles: Chain 3: Cross-Site Request Forgery on Appointment Creation → Data Injection / Flooding
Chain 4: STAFF/ADMIN Account Compromise → Full Appointment Visibility (Lateral Movement)
Chain 5: Hardcoded Django SECRET_KEY → Session Forgery → Arbitrary Identity Impersonation
